name: Old Spaghetti Factory Original Clam Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine butter, garlic, onion, and celery. Cook over medium-low heat until the vegetables are tender but not brown.
2. Add flour and stir to form a roux.
3. Drain clams, reserving juice in a separate saucepan.
4. Combine clam juice, half-and-half, thyme, and salt in the saucepan. Heat until just below boiling point.
5. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the roux, stirring constantly.
6. Stir in the chopped clams throughout the sauce.
7. Serve over noodles.
